title: Extraction chromatographic method of palladium(II) with SRS-100, a high molecular mass carboxylic acid
author: Bhabatosh Mandal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Visva-Bharati, Santiniketan-731 235, India 

  Manuscript received 12 March 1998, revised 16 December 1998, accepted 4 February 1999  

 A selective method has been developed for extraction chromatographic studies of Pd II  with  SRS-100  {liquid cation exchanger) coated on silica gel as stationary phase. Quantitative extraction of Pd II  has been achieved from acetate buffer solution across the pH range 6.0-6.5. The effect of pH, stripping agents, flow rate on extraction and elution have been investigated. Exchange capacity of the exchanger at different temperatures with respect to Pd II  have been determined. Pd II  has been separated from various. elements as well as from several synthetic multicomponent mixtures.
